systems.system_notes: Public source anchor for paediatric anaesthesia workflow guidance and point-of-care resource support.

components.component_notes: SPA resources describe paediatric anaesthesia case guides, critical-event checklists, and reference tools rather than a device tray.

unresolved_items.raw_text: SPA workflow resources do not define a tray or instrument case for this paediatric workflow row.
unresolved_items.reason: Tray rows should only be added from device-specific or site-specific kit sources.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Public society workflow resources do not provide normalized product codes.
unresolved_items.reason: Product rows should only be added from vendor-specific paediatric anaesthesia platforms if identified later.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains source-backed and high-level.
